headline: Digital Realty Asia AI Expansion Puts Valuation And Leasing In Focus
summary: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) announced multi billion dollar investments approaching S$7b to build new data centers in Singapore. The company is positioning Singapore as a key AI infrastructure hub for the Asia Pacific region. Digital Realty also launched new high density data centers and AI focused innovation labs in Japan to support advanced AI and hybrid cloud workloads. Digital Realty Trust, a global data center REIT, is extending its footprint across Asia at a time when demand for AI...
